_note: This directory will contain the real PEFT LoRA adapter weights after running scripts/train_judge_lora.py in Google Colab T4. The 3-field stub that was here previously was generated by run_training_stub.py (now deleted) and contained no real model weights.

_training_required.compute: Google Colab T4 GPU (16 GB VRAM) or RunPod community 4090
